title: Daily Memo: Mediation Efforts, Oil Supplies for Cuba
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Brokering peace? The foreign ministers of Pakistan, Turkey, Egypt and Saudi Arabia held two days of talks in Islamabad on Sunday on possible ways to end the Iran war. The four countries are considering creating a consortium to manage commercial traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. The plan would involve a fee structure similar to the […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years. GPF is non-ideological, analyzes the world and forecasts the future using geopolitics: political, economic, military and geographic dimensions at the foundation of a nation.
